title: stelis skutchii
intro: Stelis skutchii, a species of orchid native to Costa Rica and Panama, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis skutchii include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and alleviate congestion. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
